title: Unions should be avoided
description: Unions should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misraWhy is this an issue?More InfoThe use of unions to access an object in different ways may result in the data being misinterpreted. Therefore, this rule prohibits the use of unions for any purpose.Noncompliant code exampleunion U1 { // Noncompliant float j; int i; };Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Unions should be avoided. Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
